Opening day tomorrow. Bull Durham tonight.¶¶“Lollygaggers, sir.”

01 Apr 2017

30 Mar 2017

Huzzah. Apple is offering childcare for WWDC this year. That should be a huge win for a more diverse crowd. Thanks @pschiller and team!
